description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:1.20.0 Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update, installs gcc, g++, and cmake, and prints rustc and cargo versions. Define three stages: build:dacite, build:utilities, and build:examples. Add a build:dacite job in the build:dacite stage that changes directory to dacite and runs cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release. Add a build:dacite-winit job in the build:utilities stage that changes directory to dacite-winit and runs cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release. Add two jobs in the build:examples stage: build:examples/triangles that cd into examples/triangle and runs cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release, and build:examples/triangles-offscreen that cd into examples/triangle-offscreen and runs cargo build --verbose --jobs 1 --release.
